product: GoalOS AGIALPHA Ascension — Sovereign Machine Economy

doctrine.headline: The proof-bearing economy for AI work.
doctrine.subheadline: From mission to evidence, from evidence to acceptance, from acceptance to reusable capability.
doctrine.shortThesis: GoalOS turns AI work into governed institutional capacity: aims become commitments, work becomes proof, proof becomes acceptance, and accepted capability becomes reusable memory.

boundariesAsArchitecture.humanAuthority: Human acceptance is represented as a visible terminal gate in the interface.
boundariesAsArchitecture.publicPrivateProof: Public pages show proof commitments, evidence hashes, receipts, and replay paths; private intelligence remains out of public artifacts.
boundariesAsArchitecture.capabilityPropagation: Capabilities advance only through evidence, evaluation, scope, rollback, and review gates.
boundariesAsArchitecture.settlementPosture: Settlement is represented as an architectural rail and future gated module, not as an automatic action on the public site.

modules.title: Mission Commitments
modules.short: Intent becomes a signed institutional object.
modules.description: Each mission begins as a commitment with success criteria, constraints, risk class, evaluator requirements, data boundary, and rollback obligation.

modules.title: Bounded Run Fabric
modules.short: Agents execute inside a constrained work corridor.
modules.description: The run fabric resolves agents, tools, context, policies, budgets, and approval rules before work begins.

modules.title: Evidence Dockets
modules.description: Claims, sources, baselines, proof packets, verifier notes, risk ledgers, cost ledgers, replay paths, and claim boundaries become one reviewable package.

modules.title: Verifier Mesh
modules.description: Validators inspect claim support, contradictions, assumptions, source freshness, replayability, risk, and unsupported action claims.

modules.title: Human Acceptance Gate
modules.description: A reviewer or client decision admits, rejects, requests changes, or escalates a mission package.

modules.title: Reusable Capability Chronicle
modules.description: Accepted mission outcomes become durable records that can influence future work only through governed scope and replayable evidence.

previousIterationMapping.description: Mission decomposition, verifier routing, decision-state formation, and capability packaging.
Runtime identity, trace roots, output hashes, validator gates, and replay paths represented as proof objects.
Jobs become commitments, submissions become evidence dockets, review becomes selection, and receipts become durable institutional records.

publicPages.title: Machine Economy
publicPages.purpose: Agents, jobs, validators, memory, markets, and governance page.

publicPages.title: Proof Missions
publicPages.purpose: Founding proof mission offer and pilot CTA.
